empleos.descripcion: Weâve signed up to an ambitious journey. Join us! As Arrive, we guide customers and communities towards brighter futures and more livable cities, it isnât a challenge just anyone could take on. Luckily, we have something to help us make it happen. Our people and our values. We Arrive Curious, Focused and Together. Just as our entire brand is inspired by the North Star, the shining light leading travelers to their destinations since time began, our values guide us. They help us be at our best. For our customers. For the cities and communities we serve. For ourselves. As a global team, we are transforming urban mobility. Letâs grow better, together. The Role We're looking for a Business Analyst to join our Sales & Business Development team, supporting Parkopedia's global commercial operations through market intelligence, data analysis and AI-driven insights. This role sits at the heart of our commercial strategy, helping improve pipeline visibility, customer insights and revenue forecasting. You'll work closely with our global Account Managers, providing data-driven recommendations that support business growth and smarter decision-making. What You'll Do Analyse market trends, customer performance and mobility industry insights. Research competitors and market developments using modern AI tools. Support Account Managers with commercial insights and growth opportunities. Monitor customer contracts, renewals, billing and revenue forecasts. Analyse transaction data across parking, charging, fuel and tolling products. Improve CRM data quality, reporting and pipeline visibility. Produce regular commercial reporting to support business decision What You'll Bring Strong analytical and numerical skills with experience interpreting large datasets. Experience using AI tool
